AJAMAMODIFIERS-VARIETY_PACK.description: Start with [gold]Advanced Scroll Boxes[/gold], [gold]Scroll Boxes[/gold], [blue]2[/blue] [gold]New Leaves[/gold], and [gold]Pomander[/gold].
AJAMAMODIFIERS-VARIETY_PACK.title: Variety Pack
AJAMAMODIFIERS-HEIRLOOM.title: Heirloom
AJAMAMODIFIERS-SIGNATURE_ITEM.title: Signature Item
AJAMAMODIFIERS-SIGNATURE_ITEM.descriptio: Start with a random [gold]Relic[/gold] specific to your character.
AJAMAMODIFIERS-BYRD_FRIEND.title: Byrd Friend
AJAMAMODIFIERS-GOOPERT.title: Goopert
AJAMAMODIFIERS-LETS_GO_GAMBLING.title: Let's Go Gambling
AJAMAMODIFIERS-LETS_GO_GAMBLING.selectio: Choose {Amount:plural:a card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Jackpot[/gold] and [gold]Discovery[/gold].
AJAMAMODIFIERS-SIPPY.title: Sippy
AJAMAMODIFIERS-WINGED.title: Winged
AJAMAMODIFIERS-WINGED.description:
You may ignore paths when choosing the next room to travel to [blue]3[/blue] times.
At the start of each Act, gain another [blue]3[/blue] usages.
AJAMAMODIFIERS-POWER_OF_FRIENDSHIP.title: Power of Friendship
AJAMAMODIFIERS-POWER_OF_FRIENDSHIP.descr: [gold](Multiplayer)[/gold] Whenever someone plays a Power, ALL other players play that Power for free.
AJAMAMODIFIERS-TOO_MANY_CARDS.title: Too Many Cards
AJAMAMODIFIERS-TOO_MANY_CARDS.descriptio:
[gold](Multiplayer)[/gold] At the start of combat, shuffle ALL other players' [gold]Decks[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Per each additional player, increase your max [gold]Hand[/gold] size by [blue]5[/blue], and draw [blue]5[/blue] additional cards at the start of your turn.
AJAMAMODIFIERS-BARRICADE_GAMBIT.title: Barricade Gambit
AJAMAMODIFIERS-BARRICADE_GAMBIT.descript: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]75[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold], [gold]Barricade[/gold], and [red]The Gambit[/red].
AJAMAMODIFIERS-STAMPED.title: Stamped
AJAMAMODIFIERS-STAMPED.description: Choose an Attack or Skill in your [gold]Deck[/gold] to [gold]Enchant[/gold] with [purple]Royally Approved[/purple], giving it [gold]Innate[/gold] and [gold]Retain[/gold].
AJAMAMODIFIERS-PANDORA.title: Pandora
AJAMAMODIFIERS-SHRYMP_HEAVEN_NOW.title: Shrymp Heaven Now
AJAMAMODIFIERS-SHRYMP_HEAVEN_NOW.descrip: [gold]Enchant[/gold] a Skill with [purple]Imbued[/purple], playing it automatically at the start of combat.
AJAMAMODIFIERS-MIRRORING.title: Mirroring
AJAMAMODIFIERS-MIRRORING.description: [gold](Multiplayer)[/gold] Start with ALL other players' [gold]Starter Relics[/gold] (if you don't already have them) and [gold]Orb Slots[/gold] (if you have less).
